# Vextrus

> Vextrus is the AI-native ERP for Bangladesh construction & real estate — one system of record, with an AI workforce that does the work on it. The Drawing Estimator ships today; an agent writes to your books only when a named person approves.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.vextrus.com/): The category overview — the AI-native ERP for Bangladesh construction & real estate; one system of record with an AI workforce on it, led by the shipped Estimator. Path: /
- [The System](https://www.vextrus.com/system): The engine — one connected system of record for the full construction and real-estate lifecycle (finance, projects, procurement, sales, people, safety) inside one tenant boundary. An agent is only as real as what it can write to. Path: /system
- [VextrusAI](https://www.vextrus.com/ai): The AI workforce — the shipped flagship Estimator plus a roster labelled honestly by what each agent can do (Available now / In development / On the roadmap), and the 4-Eyes glass box. Path: /ai
- [Solutions](https://www.vextrus.com/solutions): Named bundles routed by buyer segment (Developer, Contractor, Hybrid) — each ends one expensive problem end-to-end. Priced to recovered value, never a seat count or a published price. Path: /solutions
- [Bangladesh-Native](https://www.vextrus.com/bangladesh): Built for Bangladesh from the ground up — NBR Mushak VAT, RAJUK/CDA/KDA/RDA approvals, BBS bar-bending standards, the land-record hierarchy, the July–June fiscal year, and money in lakh and crore. Path: /bangladesh
- [Proof](https://www.vextrus.com/proof): See it work — the real Estimator output (a drawing becomes a priced BOQ and Bar Bending Schedule, posted on one approval), the tenant-isolation/audit security story, NBR/RAJUK fit, and the honest Now/Next/Later roadmap. Path: /proof
- [Contact](https://www.vextrus.com/contact): Book a call or reach the team. Bring a structural drawing and we price it on your own project. Path: /contact

## About

Vextrus is an AI-native, multi-tenant ERP for Bangladesh construction & real estate. The product leads with VextrusAI — an AI workforce running on one connected system of record. One agent ships today (the Drawing Estimator, which turns a structural drawing into a Bill of Quantities and a waste-minimised Bar Bending Schedule). The rest of the workforce is labelled honestly: some in development, some on the roadmap. Only the Estimator is presented as a shipped flagship.

Agents never write to the books on their own. Every write-back runs through a 4-Eyes, approval-gated mechanism: an agent proposes a change via a registered command, and a named person must approve before anything is committed.

Vextrus is Bangladesh-native: it is built for NBR Mushak (VAT), RAJUK approvals, and BBS (Bar Bending Schedule) standards, defaults to the July–June fiscal year, and displays money in lakh and crore (never Western K/M notation).

Vextrus is at the pre-first-customer, market-entry stage: the product is complete and demo-proven, but there is no live customer yet. There are no customer references, testimonials, ratings, or published prices.

- Company: Vextrus Limited
- Country: Bangladesh
- Category: AI-native ERP
- Industry: construction & real estate
- Contact: ceo@vextrus.com
